description_long: This is an open book with aged, yellowed pages, lying flat and spread wide. The pages display handwritten text and some faint markings, suggesting it may be a journal or an old manuscript. The book's cover is a muted brown, visible only as a thin border beneath the pages. The edges of the pages are slightly uneven, adding to the sense of age and use. There are no visible illustrations or decorations on the cover or spine. The overall appearance is that of a well-used, vintage book, possibly used for personal notes or records.
description: An open, aged book with yellowed pages and handwritten text, featuring a plain brown cover and no visible illustrations.
description_view_0: The book is open, showing two pages with handwritten text on the right and faint writing on the left; the brown cover is visible as a thin border.
description_view_1: Viewed from the top edge, the book's open pages are visible with text on the near page and the thickness of the book apparent.
description_view_2: The book is open with the left page showing more text and markings, and the right page mostly blank; the spine is slightly visible.
description_view_3: From the opposite edge, the book's open pages are seen with the far page filled with writing and the near page mostly blank.
